query_parsed.reasoning: The query explicitly mentions 'manufacture or supply', indicating a supplier relationship is sought. (Auto-relaxed filters after zero Stage 1 matches.)
query_parsed.original_query: Companies that manufacture or supply critical components for electric vehicle battery production

core_offerings: Mining and Metals Supply Chain Solutions
companies.description: Altmin Private Limited is an Indian private company engaged in the development and manufacturing of battery materials and cell engineering for the lithium-ion battery and electric vehicle sectors. The company produces cathode and anode materials, including LFP, LMFP, and LTO chemistries, and operates a cathode gigafactory in Telangana. Altmin also manages partnerships with mines in South America to support its supply chain and provides chemical manufacturing services.

ReFire_ev is an Indian company operating in the oil and energy sector, specializing in the development and supply of electric vehicle charging infrastructure and lithium ion battery technology. The company also provides electrical vehicle chargers and EV lithium ion batteries along with their accessories.

core_offerings: Battery Material Technology Innovation and Patent Development
Lithium-Ion Battery Material Research and Development
Battery Material Standards Development and Leadership
Lithium-Ion Battery Material Sales and Distribution
companies.description: Guangdong Dongdao New Energy Co., Ltd. (广东东岛新能源股份有限公司) is a Chinese company engaged in the research, development, production, and sales of lithium-ion battery anode materials and electrolytes, with a focus on spherical and natural graphite anode materials. The company also operates as a manufacturer of artificial and natural graphite for electric vehicles, plug-in hybrid electric vehicles, energy storage systems, and 3C batteries. Dongdao New Energy is certified in environmental management, quality management, occupational health and safety management, and automotive quality management, and collaborates with research institutions to advance its technology. The company serves clients in the lithium battery industry and related sectors globally.

Stratus Materials Inc. is a U.S. company engaged in the development and manufacturing of manganese-rich, cobalt-free cathode active materials for lithium-ion batteries. The company focuses on proprietary formulations and production processes to address stability challenges in lithium manganese-rich cathode chemistries, with applications in light- to medium-duty electric vehicles, energy storage, and related battery technologies. Stratus Materials also provides materials solutions for battery manufacturers and original equipment manufacturers, supporting the sustainable development of electric vehicle batteries.

core_offerings: AI Data Center Battery Material Supply
companies.description: Nascent Materials Inc. is an American company engaged in the development and manufacturing of cathode materials for lithium-ion batteries, with a focus on lithium iron phosphate (LFP) and lithium manganese iron phosphate (LMFP) chemistries. The company operates as a manufacturer and technology provider, offering proprietary manufacturing processes that reduce production costs and waste, and are compatible with U.S. feedstocks and recycling inputs. Nascent Materials serves a global market, with a particular emphasis on the U.S. lithium-ion battery industry and markets such as electric vehicles, grid storage, industrial applications, AI data centers, defense, and aviation.

Xinyang Technology Co., Ltd. (芯量科技股份有限公司), known as SolidEdge Solution, is a Taiwanese company engaged in the development and manufacturing of solid-state lithium battery materials and components. The company operates as both a manufacturer and developer, providing in-house production of cathodes, anodes, and electrolytes, as well as integrated solutions that include material development and cell integration technologies. SolidEdge Solution serves the automotive and energy sectors, with a focus on lightweight, flexible, and high-energy density battery technologies, and collaborates with industry and academic partners to advance battery materials and technologies.

core_offerings: Lithium Iron Phosphate Cathode Material Manufacturing
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Research and Development
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Sales and Distribution
companies.description: Li Hongte New Energy Materials Co., Ltd. (陕西力宏特新能源材料有限公司), DBA Li Hongte (力宏特), is a Chinese company specialized in the research, development, production, and sales of lithium-ion battery cathode materials, with a focus on lithium iron phosphate (LFP) and ternary materials. The company primarily serves the energy storage and electric vehicle industries, supplying lithium iron phosphate cathode materials for battery manufacturing. It also operates a research institute and technical department dedicated to developing new technologies, processes, and materials, and maintains a quality control system for process data tracking and early warning systems for battery batches.

core_offerings: Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Research and Development
Energy Storage Battery Pack Sales and Distribution
Lithium-Ion Battery Cathode Material Sales and Distribution
Electric Vehicle Battery Pack Sales and Distribution
companies.description: East Saint先行 (亿博电竞东圣先行) is a Chinese high-tech enterprise engaged in the research, development, production, sales, and service of lithium-ion battery cathode materials, electric vehicle battery packs, and energy storage battery packs. The company focuses on lithium-ion battery cathode materials such as cobalt lithium, ternary materials, and lithium iron phosphate. It operates a research institute affiliated with Peking University's College of Chemistry and maintains international offices in Shenzhen and Beijing. East Saint先行 is certified as a Beijing High-Tech Enterprise and designated as a Beijing New Material Center for Phosphoric Iron Lithium.

Guangzhou Youngy Energy Technology Co., Ltd, DBA RJETech, is a Chinese manufacturer specialized in energy storage products. The company operates as a vertically integrated manufacturer, with activities in lithium mining, production of cathode and anode materials, battery cells, modules, and DC blocks. RJETech also develops self-developed battery management systems and provides expertise in electric vehicle batteries and anode materials.

core_offerings: Battery Grade Phosphate Iron Lithium Manufacturing
companies.description: Guiyang Anda Technology Energy Co., Ltd. (贵阳安达科技能源有限公司) is a Chinese company engaged in the research, development, production, and sales of phosphate iron lithium batteries, with a focus on lithium-ion battery cathode materials, phosphate iron, and phosphate iron lithium batteries. The company serves the automotive battery power, energy storage, and lead-acid replacement markets, providing battery cell products and battery systems for applications such as electric passenger cars, electric forklifts, electric sightseeing vehicles, and low-speed electric vehicles. Anda Technology is ISO certified and operates a production facility in Guiyang, China.
